deals.deal: Free Upsize Friday — 32 oz for the price of a 20 oz
deals.desc: Every Friday, Smoothie King Rewards members get a free size upgrade on any smoothie, no extra cost.

deals.deal: 50% Off Any Smoothie — FIFA World Cup Hat Trick Tango Promo
deals.desc: Jamba is celebrating the FIFA World Cup 2026 with a limited-time Hat Trick Tango smoothie plus a 50% off smoothie offer in the app.

deals.deal: Free Mod Mondays — Free Drink Customization for Rewards Members
deals.desc: All Starbucks Rewards members get one free drink modification (cold foam, extra shot, syrup, etc.) every month on a Monday.

deals.deal: Free Pastry, Bagel, or Sweet with Any Purchase — MyPanera Members
deals.desc: Join MyPanera Rewards (free) and get a free pastry, sweet treat, or bagel with any purchase, plus personalized ongoing rewards.

deals.deal: Free Large Fries with $1+ Purchase — Free Fries Friday (App)
deals.desc: Every Friday, McDonald's app rewards members get a free large fries with any purchase of $1 or more via mobile order.

deals.deal: $4 Breakfast Meal Deal — Sausage McMuffin or Biscuit + Hash Browns + Coffee
deals.desc: Get a Sausage McMuffin or Sausage Biscuit, Hash Browns, and a small Premium Roast Coffee bundled for just $4 via the app.

deals.deal: Happy Hour — Half-Price Drinks & Slushes 2–4 PM Daily via App
deals.desc: Order ahead in the Sonic app every day from 2–4 PM (2–5 PM at some locations) for half-price drinks and slushes.
Sonic's new $7 Big Deal Meal combo is a discounted bundled option available at participating locations nationwide.

deals.deal: Free Crispy Chicken Taco with $15+ Order on Uber Eats
deals.desc: Through July 13, Taco Bell rewards members ordering $15+ on Uber Eats get a free Crispy Chicken Taco added to their order.

deals.deal: L.O.C.O.S. Game — Free Taco on First Play (App)
deals.desc: Taco Bell Rewards members can play the L.O.C.O.S. in-app game through July 13 and unlock a free taco on their first play.

deals.deal: Any Pizza, Any Toppings for $9.99 — Best Deal Ever is Back
deals.desc: Domino's 'Best Deal Ever' lets you get any pizza with any crust and any toppings for $9.99 each, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust free.

deals.deal: $7.99 Any 1-Topping Carryout Pizza — Weekly Carryout Special
deals.desc: Pizza Hut's ongoing weekly deal gives you any 1-topping carryout pizza (excludes XL) for just $7.99 at participating locations.

deals.deal: Free Frosty or $2 Off Breakfast Combo — App Coupons
deals.desc: Wendy's regularly rotates in-app coupons including a free Frosty or $2 off a Breakfast Combo for app users.
Every Wednesday, Burger King offers a discounted Whopper deal for app users at participating locations.
Arby's is offering any of its Sliders for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time.
